objects.script: fn on_update(dt) { let started = get_var("wander_started"); if started != true { play_animation("duck", "wander"); set_var("wander_started", true); } }
fn on_grab(hand, point) { grab_at_joint("rifle", hand + "_grip", point); } fn on_release(hand) { detach("rifle", hand); }
fn on_grab(hand, point) { grab_at_joint("pistol", hand + "_grip", point); grab_at_joint("glock_slide", hand + "_grip"); } fn on_release(hand) { detach("pistol", hand); detach("glock_slide", hand); }
